steps.title: Express the supplementary angle
steps.content:
The acute angle formed by the transversal is $(9x - 490)$. Since acute and obtuse angles on a straight line are supplementary:
$$\text{obtuse} = 180 - (9x - 490) = 670 - 9x$$

steps.title: Write the sum expression
steps.content:
The total measure $w$ equals one acute angle plus three obtuse angles:
$$w = (9x - 490) + 3(670 - 9x)$$

steps.title: Expand and simplify
steps.content:
$$w = 9x - 490 + 2010 - 27x = -18x + 1520$$
The coefficient of $x$ is $-18$ and the constant is $\mathbf{1520}$, so $w = 1520$ when the $x$-terms cancel.
The answer is 1520.
